source_detail: Read-only GET http://127.0.0.1:7878/api/state. The endpoint exposed project id, run ids, risk_map findings, severity, category, and verify booleans. It did not expose browser confidence, grade, DOM selectors, request URLs, canary traces, or extension scan mode.

findings.detail: moves money - must require approval above a threshold
can exfiltrate data to an external recipient
no runtime intent guard: untrusted ticket text can trigger any tool, including money movement and PII exfiltration
no approval gate for high-impact tools (refund / plan change)

mock_todo: Mode 1 browser confidence is not exposed by /api/state.
Overall A-F grade is not exposed by /api/state.
DOM selectors, request URLs, and canary in-out evidence are not exposed by /api/state.
This is an extension experience prototype, not shipped MV3 packaging.
